sentence: yaḥ yaḥ hi annam atti yaḥ retaḥ siñcati tat bhūyas eva bhavati
savitustvā prasava utpunāmy achidreṇa pavitreṇa sūryasya raśmibhiriti so 'sāveva bandhuḥ
dakṣiṇe keśānta oṣadhe trāyasveti darbham antardhāya svadhita iti kṣureṇābhinidhāya yenāvapat savitā kṣureṇa somasya rājño varuṇasya vidvān
sādhu pātaya māṃ kṣipraṃ rāmasyopari rāvaṇa
uto tad adya vidyāma yatas tat pariṣicyate
apānyad ety abhy anyad eti viṣurūpe ahanī saṃ carete
sa kathayati kumāra ime matsyā upari bhramantaḥ paśyanti
ijyayā vā pradānair vā viprāṇāṃ vardhate yaśaḥ
yadādhvaryur āha praśāstaḥ prasuhīty oṃ sarpateti praśāstāha
idam apūrvaṃ sattvam iha vane pṛcchyatām
mānyaśrīḥ syānmadananṛpateḥ kokilā te 'nukūlā bhūyānmaivaṃ sakṛdapi tayā viprayogaprasaṅgaḥ
sa yan nānupraharaty etena hy ata ūrdhvāny ahāni pracariṣyan bhavati
yābhir aṅgiro manasā niraṇyatho 'graṃ gacchatho vivare goarṇasaḥ
tad yasmai yajñāya gṛhṇāti taṃ haviṣmantaṃ karoti
agnau na tāpayetpādau hastaṃ padbhyāṃ na saṃspṛśet
yathāpratijñaṃ rājendra na ca mithyā bravīmyaham
kaṃ tvadya yajase devaṃ pitaraṃ kaṃ na vidmahe
pra budhnyā va īrate mahāṃsi pra nāmāni prayajyavas tiradhvam
yathāha bharataśreṣṭha nāradas tat tathā kuru
staumīndraṃ nāthito johavīmi sa no muñcatv aṃhasaḥ
durjanasahavāsād api śīlotkarṣaṃ na sajjanas tyajati
athādhvaryo śaṃśaṃsāvom iti stotriyāyānurūpāyokthamukhāya paridhānīyāyā iti catuścaturāhvayante
mūṣāmadhye dhamann evaṃ saptavāraṃ samaṃ kṣipet
tasmād api parāṅ yan pratyaṅ śṛṇoti
yaścāsau maṇḍale śukle nirūṣmā na prakāśate
jyotir vā ete bhavanty amṛtā bhavanti ye sattram āsate
āpibeyaṃ samudraṃ ca mṛtyuṃ hanyāṃ raṇe sthitaḥ
harihari yāhi mādhava yāhi keśava mā vada kaitavavādam tām anusara sarasīruhalocana yā tava harati viṣādam
nāgena vedhayecchulbaṃ śulbe tāraṃ tu vedhayet
kuru setuṃ samudre tvaṃ śakto hyasi mato mama
yat vadanti tamaḥ mūḍhāḥ mūrkhāḥ dharmam a jānataḥ tat pāpam śatadhā bhūtvā vaktṝn samadhigacchati
kukṣau śithile hṛdayabandhaṃ muktvā saśūle jaghane prajāyata ityavadhārayet
yajamāno hi bhikṣitvā caṇḍālaḥ pretya jāyate
punastvāṃ svena rūpeṇa draṣṭum icchāmi śāśvatam
taṃ tathaivāgataṃ saṃvatsaraḥ pratinandaty ayaṃ te bhagavo lokaḥ
dṛṣṭvā janmajarāvipattimaraṇaṃ trāsaś ca notpadyate pītvā mohamayīṃ pramādamadirām unmattabhūtaṃ jagat
purīṣamāsyād api vā nireti purīṣavege 'bhihate narasya
tathāpy upekṣaṇīyaṃ te na me tad api rocate
yam īṃ dvā savayasā saparyataḥ samāne yonā mithunā samokasā
